nasb.text: While Saul talked to the priest, the commotion in the camp of the Philistines continued and increased; so Saul said to the priest, “Withdraw your hand.”

esv.text: Now while Saul was talking to the priest, the tumult in the camp of the Philistines increased more and more. So Saul said to the priest, “Withdraw your hand.”

cnv.text: 掃羅正對祭司說話的時候，非利士營中的騷亂越來越大，掃羅就對祭司說：“住手吧！”

ccb.text: 扫罗和祭司说话的时候，非利士人营里越来越混乱。扫罗对祭司说：“停手吧。”
